_comment: VOLT — Cyber City (gym 7, Electric) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), keeping the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage/engage_cyber_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Geometry is reused VERBATIM from Cicada (takehara_leader_intro): pull up over the challenger's shoulder, TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to the leader's face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. Theme is swapped to Electric: note-block bit/chime arpeggio, a lightning-bolt impact crack, and a beacon power-select hum; electric_spark then crit particles burst ON Volt (anchored to his uuid c839f20b-cffb-4103-87cc-cf57525a5ae7 via `execute at <uuid>`, so placement lands on the leader instead of the challenger-facing guess). startTitle names him. IN-WORLD TUNING MAY BE NEEDED: air-verify the particle burst height (~1 above the leader eye) and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Cyber City arena and nudge if the grid stage sits high/low. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at c839f20b-cffb-4103-87cc-cf57525a5ae7 run particle minecraft:electric_spark ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at c839f20b-cffb-4103-87cc-cf57525a5ae7 run particle minecraft:crit ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
